subject: Hold implementation facts for Novakem environmental subpoena
facts: The November 25, 2024 legal hold was issued to company custodians through email only.
The off-site storage vendor that controlled EHS correspondence boxes was not added to the hold distribution before the January 6, 2025 destruction cycle.
The hold notice did not specifically instruct EHS custodians to preserve personal phones or SMS used for EHS communications.
The IT collection team refers to the seven-year email archive as Ironvault; this is the archive source described in the API records as the executive email archive and Seven-year archive.
The October 2023 environmental audit is expected to be retained by the vendor portal under the five-year report retention rule.
